results.requirement_text: The system shall notify a user when their account email address is changed.

test_cases.title: Verify notification after email address change
test_cases.objective: Verify that a user receives a notification after their account email address is changed
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.
User is authenticated and has a valid email address on file

assumptions: Notification delivery method (e.g., email, in-app message) is not specified
